Final response excerpt:
Live and verified — the width cap shipped and the new JS bundle contains `fitBounds`.

## Done

The map now **opens zoomed into the campus core** instead of a tiny cluster lost in empty outskirts. Two changes:

- **`fitBounds`** — instead of a fixed zoom-15, the map now auto-frames to the actual pin spread, so it opens as tight as it can while still showing every pin. Adapts to any screen.
- **Width cap (60rem, centered)** — the full-width banner was so wide that even a tight zoom left Route 5 and dead space on the sides. Capping it keeps the frame on Hanover.

Verified in a real browser at desktop and phone widths — campus fills the frame both ways, pins spread out and easy to hit, no Route 5. All 40 tests pass, tooling cleaned up.
